name: Don Agro International Limited
summary: Don Agro International Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an agricultural company in the Rostov region in Russia. It operates through two segments, Crops and Livestock. The Crops segment produces and sells agricultural produce, which include winter wheat, sunflower, sorghum, corn, and flax. This segment sells its agricultural produce primarily to international and local grain traders and exporters. The Livestock segment produces and sells raw milk to dairy processing companies. This segment also engages in the sale of livestock. The company is also involved in asset leasing and construction of livestock building activities. Don Agro International Limited was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Millerovo, Russia.
